overview: Clinic4Men specializes in erectile dysfunction treatment using non-surgical, in-office procedures including GAINSWave therapy and P-Shot injections. The clinic also offers testosterone HRT, hair restoration, skin tightening, and joint injections.
highlights: Certified provider of GAINSWave Pulse Wave Therapy
Hair restoration with stem cells and skin tightening technology
targetAudience: Men seeking treatment for erectile dysfunction and other men's health concerns including hair loss and skin rejuvenation.
